Add Photo Here

Pragna is not your typical health coach. She is a Pharmacist, Clinical Dietician, and Yoga Expert who believes that true health isn't found in a pill or a crash diet it’s found in the balance of Mātrāśin.
With a deep background in how the body works at a molecular level, Pragna bridges the gap between ancient wisdom and modern science. Her mission is to move people away from the "diet culture" and toward a life of functional strength and vitality.
She doesn't believe in "perfect" bodies; she believes in functioning bodies. Her work under Mātrāśin focuses on making you stronger today than you were yesterday, using the exact measure of food and movement your unique body requires.

Mātrāśin The Art of Eating Right

From Sanskrit — mātrā (measure, right amount) + aśin (eating). An ancient principle that your body already knows. Pragna's practice is built on helping you remember it.

Philosophy
Reconnecting with Food: The Art of Mātrāśin

In a world filled with “miracle diets” and rigid weight-loss rules, we’ve lost something essential — our natural connection between the body and the plate.

At Mātrāśin, we bring that connection back. Our work is rooted in ancient wisdom — the practice of Mātrāśin, which means eating in perfect measure.

This is not about restriction or temporary detoxes. It is about giving your body exactly what it needs to truly thrive.

What is Mātrāśin?
The Goldilocks Principle of Nutrition

Not too much, not too little, but just right.

Instead of obsessing over calories, we guide you to reconnect with your body’s natural hunger and satiety signals.

When you eat in the right measure, food becomes medicine. When balance is lost, even the healthiest food can become a burden.

Beyond the Weight Loss Cycle
A Lifestyle, Not a Temporary Fix

Weight loss today has become performative — quick results, short-term changes, and inevitable regain.

Fad diets trap you in a cycle of losing and gaining, over and over again.

Mātrāśin breaks that cycle. It is not a temporary fix — it is a sustainable lifestyle shift.

It’s not about eating less. It’s about eating right. It’s not about control. It’s about awareness. It’s not just a diet — it’s the art of living well.

Transformation Stories
"

I had been battling PCOD for four years — trying every diet, every supplement. Pragna never put me on a diet. She put me on a lifestyle. Within three months, my cycles normalised. Within six, I felt like myself again.
